'''vashushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draggie|draggie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draggie|draggie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vashushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væshishith|væshishith]] || [[word:væshishij|væshishij]] || [[word:væshishish|væshishish]] || [[word:væshishi|væshishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashushushuth|vashushushuth]] || [[word:vashushushuj|vashushushuj]] || [[word:vashushushush|vashushushush]] || [[word:vashushushu|vashushushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashushuth|vashushuth]] || [[word:vashushuj|vashushuj]] || [[word:vashushush|vashushush]] || [[word:vashushu|vashushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashufshuth|vashufshuth]] || [[word:vashufshuj|vashufshuj]] || [[word:vashufshush|vashufshush]] || [[word:vashufshuf|vashufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashushuthu|vashushuthu]] || [[word:vashushuju|vashushuju]] || [[word:vashushushu|vashushushu]] || [[word:vashushuku|vashushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashushuth|vashushuth]] || [[word:vashushuj|vashushuj]] || [[word:vashushush|vashushush]] || [[word:vashushu|vashushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashushuthul|vashushuthul]] || [[word:vashushujul|vashushujul]] || [[word:vashushushul|vashushushul]] || [[word:vashushukul|vashushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashushuthuthu|vashushuthuthu]] || [[word:vashushujuju|vashushujuju]] || [[word:vashushushushu|vashushushushu]] || [[word:vashushuku|vashushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashushuthun|vashushuthun]] || [[word:vashushujun|vashushujun]] || [[word:vashushushun|vashushushun]] || [[word:vashushukun|vashushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashushuthuoro|vashushuthuoro]] || [[word:vashushujuoro|vashushujuoro]] || [[word:vashushushuoro|vashushushuoro]] || [[word:vashushukuoro|vashushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
